sigWerErrors.reason: 'bir' (one/a) adds a modifier to 'türlü' (kind/type), but does not significantly change the overall meaning of the sentence.

Changing 'olmanıza' (your being) to 'olmamıza' (our being) shifts the subject from second person plural to first person plural, which changes who is being referred to and alters the meaning of the sentence.
